description: Search for or read a FHIR Organization resource representing companies, institutions, departments, or healthcare practice groups. For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, provide identifier, name, or partof (parent organization).

searchParams._id: Organization resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.active: Whether the organization's record is active
searchParams.address-use: Use of the address (work, temp, old, billing)
searchParams.endpoint: Technical endpoints providing access to services
searchParams.name: A portion of the organization's name or alias
searchParams.phonetic: A portion of the name using phonetic matching
searchParams.type: A code for the type of organization
